writes.content: 2025 Q1 Goal: Complete core engine storage layer development, reach M1 milestone
2025 Q2 Goal: Implement BM25 and semantic dual-channel retrieval, reach M2 milestone
2025 Q3 Goal: Complete spreading activation retrieval and explanation paths, reach M4 milestone
2025 Q4 Goal: Implement background consolidation and contradiction discovery, reach M5 milestone and release v0.1.0
